title: Digest — Mar 26, 2026, 02:26 AM UTC
summary:
# Pwarf Development Digest

We're excited to share the latest updates and enhancements in our colony sim game, pwarf! Here's what we've been working on:

## Gameplay Improvements
- **Buildability of Tiles**: We've updated the game to allow players to place build tasks on **mud** and **sand** tiles. These tiles are now part of the buildable array and are also included in the **FARMABLE** set, enabling farm plots to be designated on them. This change addresses issues with swamp and desert biomes being unplayable.

- **Hauling Efficiency**: To enhance the flow of tasks, dwarves will now automatically step off stockpile tiles after completing a haul. This fix prevents them from getting stuck on occupied tiles and improves overall task efficiency.

## Documentation Updates
- **Design Document Audit**: Our design documents have undergone a thorough audit. We've corrected timing constants to reflect accurate gameplay metrics, updated phase lists to include all 18 phases, and revised the data-flow documentation to align with these changes. This ensures better clarity and consistency for developers and players alike.

We appreciate your support as we continue to improve pwarf. Happy building!

## Merged PRs
- PR #690
- PR #685
- PR #684
